messages.content:
[USER]: Hi!
[YAYA]: Hi there! How can I help you today?
[USER]: I'm thinking about visiting Kenya. Where should I go?
[YAYA]: Kenya is incredible for visitors! Some highlights: Maasai Mara for wildlife, Mombasa for beaches, Nairobi for the city experience, and Mount Kenya for hiking. Are you more interested in wildlife, culture, or beaches?
[USER]: Wildlife for sure. What's the best time to go?

For wildlife, the absolute best time is July to October — that's when the Great Wildebeest Migration happens in the Maasai Mara. You'll see hundreds of thousands of wildebeest crossing the Mara River. It's one of the greatest wildlife spectacles on Earth!

For wildlife, the absolute best time is July to October — that's when the Great Wildebeest Migration happens in the Maasai Mara. You'll see hundreds of thousands of wildebeest crossing the Mara River. It's one of the greatest wildlife spectacles on Earth!

[USER]: Habari!
[YAYA]: Habari! Nzuri sana, asante. Naweza kukusaidia na nini?
[USER]: Nataka kujua kuhusu Nairobi.
[YAYA]: Sawa! Nairobi ni mji mkuu wa Kenya. Ni mji mkubwa zaidi Afrika Mashariki, na una mambo mengi ya kufanya.
[USER]: Asante. Una ushauri gani kwa mgeni?

Karibu! Kwa mgeni Nairobi, napendekeza: tembelea Nairobi National Park (pekee duniani ndani ya mji mkuu), nenda Westgate au Village Market kwa maduka, jaribu nyama choma katika mikahawa mizuri, na tembelea Bomas of Kenya kwa utamaduni wa makabila ya Kenya.
